title: Broken type inference when using sql round
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_round (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2), nullable_value DECIMAL(10, 2) NULL);
INSERT INTO test_round (id, value, nullable_value) VALUES (1, 750.25, NULL);
SELECT ROUND(value, 1) FROM test_round WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ROUND(nullable_value, 1) FROM test_round WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ROUND(value + 0.5, 1) FROM test_round WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: sql round function type inference failure
